evidence_quotes.quote: "I really hope the EU will look into implementing an end of life law that prevents the IP owners of video games to suddenly shut down the servers to their product that always require internet connection. I do not want to require game publishers to always keep the servers online, let the consumers host their own servers once the IP owner wants to sunset their game."

paragraphs.text: I really hope the EU will look into implementing an end of life law that prevents the IP owners of video games to suddenly shut down the servers to their product that always require internet connection. I do not want to require game publishers to always keep the servers online, let the consumers host their own servers once the IP owner wants to sunset their game.
